title: bolbitis neglecta
intro: Bolbitis neglecta is a species of fern, specifically a type of water fern that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae. It is native to tropical regions in Africa and Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. Bolbitis neglecta can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional remedies as a poultice or topical application.
